properties.description: DLP policy blocks on Microsoft 365 Copilot prompts detected in Purview — sensitive information types or labeled content prevented from reaching the Copilot response or web search.
properties.query:
union isfuzzy=true SecurityAlert
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| extend ProductName = tostring(column_ifexists('ProductName', ''))
| extend AlertName = tostring(column_ifexists('AlertName', ''))
| extend AlertSeverity = tostring(column_ifexists('AlertSeverity', ''))
| extend Entities = tostring(column_ifexists('Entities', ''))
| extend Description = tostring(column_ifexists('Description', ''))
| extend CompromisedEntity = tostring(column_ifexists('CompromisedEntity', ''))
| extend ExtendedProperties = tostring(column_ifexists('ExtendedProperties', ''))
| where ProductName has 'Microsoft Data Loss Prevention' or ProductName has 'Microsoft 365 DLP'
| where AlertName has 'Copilot' or ExtendedProperties has 'CopilotExperiences' or ExtendedProperties has 'copilotPromptBlock' or ExtendedProperties has 'copilotLabelBlock'
| extend AccountUpn = tostring(parse_json(Entities) [0].Name)
| project TimeGenerated, AlertName, AlertSeverity, CompromisedEntity, AccountUpn, Description, Entities, ExtendedProperties
